title: 52pcs tyre Repair kit, Heavy Duty car tyre Puncture Repair kit, tubeless tyre Repair kit with Storage Case, tyre Plug Repair kit for car, Motorcycle, Truck, Van, ATV, Tractor, etc.
features: EASY TO USE: The tire repair kit is user friendly, no need to remove the tyre from the wheel to fix a flat tyre quickly and easily, it is suitable for most tubeless cars, SUVs, electric cars, motorbikes and bicycles with flat tyres. The product comes with a full-colour instruction manual, the operation steps are clear at a glance, even beginners don't have to worry about not knowing how to operate it.

HIGH QUALITY PUNCTURE REPAIR KIT FOR CAR: The tools in the puncher repair kit car, including the handle and spare needle, are made of high quality stainless steel, which is durable and not easy to rust.The T-shaped handle design reduces the labour intensity and allows you to make repairs easily. Perfectly sealed natural rubber strip with excellent anti-aging properties.

52 PCS TYRE REPAIR KIT CAR: Our tyre repair kit comes with a full range of accessories, including 1 x 4-in-1 valve core tool, 1 x Allen spanner, 8 x plastic valve caps, 4 x stainless steel anti-theft steel nuts, 4 x aluminium alloy anti-theft nuts, 4 x valve cores, 1 x plastic case, 1 x threaded needle handle, 1 x fork handle, 2 x spare needles, and 25 x tyre repair strips.
EASY TO CARRY: The kit comes with a storage box, easy to carry, perfect for emergency use when your car tyres are on the road.
CONTACT US IF ANY QUESTIONS: It is our responsibility to provide our customers with a good experience. Please feel free to contact us if parts are missing or other problems occur.
description: Product Description Our tire repair tools are the highest quality repair kits on the market for repairing vacuum burst tires. It can easily solve the puncture problem of tubeless tires of automobiles, motorcycles, off-road vehicles and electric vehicles. Simple and easy to learn, even beginners can complete it quickly. Our tire plug kits are made for the toughest tires on the market. Our tools never cut corners. We use the best materials to ensure the quality of our tire repair kits, and each handle comes with a spare needle and is reusable, greatly extending the life of the tool. They are packaged in a sturdy carrying case for easy storage and portability. The tool is ergonomically designed and the T-handle makes it easy to operate. The tire patch is made of natural rubber, which is extremely sticky. It plugs the holes in your tires perfectly without gaps. You can confidently get back on the road and continue your journey. You will receive a brand new high quality product. This tire repair kit includes all the tools and parts you need, no additional accessories required. Instructions will also be mailed to you with the product. This tire repair kit contains everything you need to make operation simple and easy. Kit contains: 1 x Four-in-one Valve Core Tool 1 x Allen Key 8 x Plastic Valve Cap 4 x Stainless Steel Steal Nut 4 x Aluminum Alloy Anti-theft Nut 4 x Valve Core 1 x Tire Repair Handle 1 x Threaded Needle Handle 2 x Spare tire needle 25 x Tire Repair Strip 1 x Plastic Box T-shaped solid handle If you are worried that the rubber strips are not enough, you can go to the store to buy additional tire repair strips Blue box High temperature and drop resistant plastic shell Full range of tools Repair kits available for emergency tire repairs Operate anytime, anywhere It can be operated directly on the roadside, which is convenient and fast Instructions for use Step 1 Before you start repairing your tires, remember to remove dirt and debris from around the holes. Step 2 Use a metal threaded drill to rotate back and forth to pierce the hole and enlarge the leak. Step 3 Prepare a tire strip and place it in the tire repair fork drill. Step 4 Put the tire repair fork drill and the tire strip into the hole at the same time. Step 5 Slowly rotate 360 degrees and pull out the tire fork drill, then to trim off any excess tire strips from the tire. Step 6 Complete tire repairs.
